column8: The mailbox is located on the hangar next to the office door that says “Floathaven Seaplane Base”
The mailbox is located adjacent to the office at the base of the ramp (that heads to shore).

Lat / Long (Estimated): Available weekdays 0630L-2000L and weekends 0730L-2000L at the check-in counter in the passenger terminal.  Ask for assistance at the counter.
